prompt: An anime-style scene in which a [product type] is the emotional anchor of the frame — [lens] equivalent mid-distance, a [character type] holding or using the product with [emotional state] expressed through posture and expression, [environment] behind them rendered in [art style] painterly detail, [light quality] soft and directional, the product drawn with more detail and sharper lines than everything around it, cinematic anime still, 16:9. Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
